issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage in instructions.

scenarios.name: Dual ESM+CJS library with type declarations
scenarios.rationale: Baseline picks the right format/dts flags but typically writes an imprecise package.json exports map missing .d.cts and types-first ordering; treatment includes clean:true and the documented exports shape exactly.

scenarios.name: Multi-entry React component library
scenarios.rationale: Baseline often uses a single entry or omits external/subpath exports; treatment uses the entry-object map, splitting+treeshake, react in external, and matching subpath exports per the skill's examples.
